dealSummary: Paris-based Mistral AI is in talks to raise a €3 billion round at a €20 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.

Genspark, the developer of workplace AI agents, raised a $100 million Series B extension from investors including Sozo Ventures, UpHonest Capital and Mirae Asset at a $2.6 billion valuation, Axios reported.
leadInvestors: Sozo Ventures, UpHonest Capital, Mirae Asset

dealSummary: Barcelona-based robotics startup Theker received an $85 million Series A led by CRV.
Mumbai-based SolarSquare Energy secured between $50 million and $55 million in a round led by B Capital.
Industrial solar and battery specialist The Standard Electron Co. is raising between $25 million and $35 million in seed funding, Axios reported.
AI call assistant developer Equal AI received a $30 million Series B led by Prosus Ventures and Tomales Bay Capital.
Skincare products company Remedy secured a $20 million Series A led by L Catterton, according to reports.
